_meta.note: Prices are USD per million tokens. Per CLAUDE.md §6.3 every entry is cited inline (JSON has no comments, so citations are the per-entry `source`/`asOf` fields). Do not guess: models absent here price as 'unknown' and must be surfaced as such, not fabricated. Verify against the provider pricing page before relying on a value.
_meta.cachedInputNote: cachedInputPerMTok is the per-MTok rate for cache-read (hit) input tokens, used by the M3 cache detector.
